recent.statement: Tensions between Iran and Saudi Arabia will escalate, leading to a naval confrontation in the Persian Gulf
recent.evidence: The only Strait of Hormuz signal (S4) shows reduced ship transits, not a naval confrontation between Iran and Saudi Arabia; no signal reports any such event.

recent.statement: NG=F will increase by at least 2% in the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows NG=F increased by at least 2% within the 24-hour window, and such a market move would have been recorded.

recent.statement: A major flood will occur in the Rhine River region within the next week, causing significant damage to infrastructure and disrupting trade.
recent.evidence: No signal shows a major Rhine River flood causing significant infrastructure damage or trade disruption during the window, though such an event would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: A cyberattack will compromise the Oracle E-Business Suite within the next week, causing significant disruption to businesses worldwide.
recent.evidence: No admissible signal shows any Oracle E-Business Suite cyberattack causing worldwide business disruption during the window.

recent.statement: A Category 1 hurricane will make landfall in Honduras within the next week.
recent.evidence: The only cyclone signals (BERTHA, FAUSTO, ELIDA) are far from Honduras, remain tropical-storm strength with zero Category 1 wind impact, so no Category 1 landfall in Honduras occurred.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will strike the Pacific Ring of Fire within the next week, affecting the west coast of North America.
recent.location: Pacific Ring of Fire, West Coast, North America
recent.evidence: No captured signal documents a major earthquake affecting the west coast of North America during the window, and such an event would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: A Category 1 tropical cyclone will make landfall in Honduras
recent.evidence: The three tropical cyclone signals (BERTHA, FAUSTO, ELIDA) are located far from Honduras with zero population affected by Category 1 winds, and no signal shows a Category 1 landfall in Honduras.

recent.statement: A major cyberattack will occur on the Oracle E-Business Suite within the next week
recent.evidence: No admissible signal reports a major cyberattack on Oracle E-Business Suite during the window, and such an event would have been captured.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in Mexico within the next week
recent.evidence: The three cyclone signals (BERTHA, FAUSTO, ELIDA) are all green alerts with zero population affected and are located offshore or near the US Gulf coast, with none showing a landfall in Mexico.

recent.statement: NG=F price will rise by at least 2% within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: No signal reports NG=F (natural gas) price movement; only oil benchmarks (WTI, Brent) are shown, so no evidence of a 2% natural gas rise exists.

recent.statement: The price of Brent Crude will increase by at least $1 within the next 24h
recent.evidence: S10 shows Brent Crude at 86.83 $/bbl down 7.7%, indicating a decrease rather than the required $1 increase.

recent.statement: NG=F will move up by at least 2% within the next 24h
recent.evidence: No captured signal shows NG=F moving up by at least 2% within the 24h window.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
